Problem: All 60 signals were NO_OPERAR because:
1. Proven Edge Filter blocked everything in strict mode (even unproven combos)
2. OffHours session check killed all signals outside trading hours
3. Edge Profile RED classification blocked non-blocked patterns
4. Confidence threshold too high (15%) for data collection mode

Fixes:
- Proven Edge: strict mode only in production (sampleSize >= 1000);
  data collection allows non-blocked patterns with reduced confidence
- OffHours: in data collection mode, generate signals with -15 confidence penalty
  instead of hard blocking
- Edge Profile RED: only hard-block for confirmed loser patterns (breakout,
  trend_continuation, none); allow liquidity_sweep/fakeout/engulfing/reversal
  even with RED edge in data collection mode
- Final check: lowered threshold from 15% to 10% for data collection;
  signals with confidence >= 10% and a pattern now generate

This should produce WIN/LOSS signals that feed the statistical engine
and help the system learn which combos actually work." class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e7dfafcffbb0c51ca242ab35aa6dea90fae0d2c2">fix: enable data collection mode to generate Major changes:
1. Phase 5 candle fetch: 200 → 10 per timeframe (incremental, not full seed)
   - Reduces DB writes from 1600 to ~80 per cycle
   - Full seed (200) only when DB has < 50 candles for that asset+tf
2. Phase 3: Add incremental mode (20 candles) when DB has 50-200 candles
3. Add per-phase timing logs to identify bottlenecks
4. Add DB keepalive (ping every 120s) to prevent cold connections
5. Add DB concurrency limiter (semaphore, max 4 concurrent ops)
6. Suppress prisma:error fetch failed noise via console.error filter
7. Set PrismaClient log: [] to silence internal Prisma error logging
8. Add timing summary at end of each cycle

Expected result: Cycle time drops from ~619s to ~60-90s" class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/a23b55d7abd810b8c9a47773133c5a6d26fd72f5">perf: reduce cycle time from ~10min to ~1min title="fix: robust position cleanup — updateMany mass closure + withRetry + maxOpenPositions fix

- Startup cleanup: use updateMany instead of one-by-one engine.closePosition()
  - 3 operations (positions, trades, signals) instead of 100+ per-position
  - Atomic and much faster (~2s instead of ~50s for 20 positions)
  - Added verification step after cleanup with retry if positions remain
- Execution Engine closePosition: wrap critical DB ops with withRetry()
  - Position update: 5 retries with 2s base delay (CRITICAL - must succeed)
  - Trade update: 3 retries with 1s base delay
  - Account & signal updates: non-critical, wrapped in try/catch
- Risk Manager: fix maxOpenPositions to use both config and account settings
  - Changed from hardcoded max(config, 20) to max(config, account, 10)
  - Prevents 20/20 max when DB has stale maxOpenPositions=20
  - Added (modo recolección) label in the rejection message
- Worker: sync riskConfig appSettings with account.maxOpenPositions
- Bybit API: suppress noisy 'fetch failed' network error logs
  - Only log non-network errors as errors; network errors are silent" class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e77e39056e647d7415f056f16e3ced4f3c62b857">fix: robust position cleanup — updateMany mass closure + withRetry + …</a></div></div></td><td><div class="react-directory-commit-age"><relative-time tense="past" datetime="2026-05-30T05:24:33.000Z" title="May 30, 2026, 5:24 AM title="fix: robust position cleanup — updateMany mass closure + withRetry + maxOpenPositions fix

- Startup cleanup: use updateMany instead of one-by-one engine.closePosition()
  - 3 operations (positions, trades, signals) instead of 100+ per-position
  - Atomic and much faster (~2s instead of ~50s for 20 positions)
  - Added verification step after cleanup with retry if positions remain
- Execution Engine closePosition: wrap critical DB ops with withRetry()
  - Position update: 5 retries with 2s base delay (CRITICAL - must succeed)
  - Trade update: 3 retries with 1s base delay
  - Account & signal updates: non-critical, wrapped in try/catch
- Risk Manager: fix maxOpenPositions to use both config and account settings
  - Changed from hardcoded max(config, 20) to max(config, account, 10)
  - Prevents 20/20 max when DB has stale maxOpenPositions=20
  - Added (modo recolección) label in the rejection message
- Worker: sync riskConfig appSettings with account.maxOpenPositions
- Bybit API: suppress noisy 'fetch failed' network error logs
  - Only log non-network errors as errors; network errors are silent" class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e77e39056e647d7415f056f16e3ced4f3c62b857">fix: robust position cleanup — data-pjax="true" title="perf: reduce cycle time from ~10min to ~1min + DB keepalive + prisma:error suppression

Major changes:
1. Phase 5 candle fetch: 200 → 10 per timeframe (incremental, not full seed)
   - Reduces DB writes from 1600 to ~80 per cycle
   - Full seed (200) only when DB has < 50 candles for that asset+tf
2. Phase 3: Add incremental mode (20 candles) when DB has 50-200 candles
3. Add per-phase timing logs to identify bottlenecks
4. Add DB keepalive (ping every 120s) to prevent cold connections
5. Add DB concurrency limiter (semaphore, max 4 concurrent ops)
6. Suppress prisma:error fetch failed noise via console.error filter
7. Set PrismaClient log: [] to silence internal Prisma error logging
8. Add timing summary at end of each cycle

Expected result: Cycle time drops from ~619s to ~60-90s" class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/a23b55d7abd810b8c9a47773133c5a6d26fd72f5">perf: reduce cycle time from ~10min to ~1min class="react-directory-row-commit-cell"><div><div class="react-directory-commit-message"><a data-pjax="true" title="fix: enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals

Problem: All 60 signals were NO_OPERAR because:
1. Proven Edge Filter blocked everything in strict mode (even unproven combos)
2. OffHours session check killed all signals outside trading hours
3. Edge Profile RED classification blocked non-blocked patterns
4. Confidence threshold too high (15%) for data collection mode

Fixes:
- Proven Edge: strict mode only in production (sampleSize >= 1000);
  data collection allows non-blocked patterns with reduced confidence
- OffHours: in data collection mode, generate signals with -15 confidence penalty
  instead of hard blocking
- Edge Profile RED: only hard-block for confirmed loser patterns (breakout,
  trend_continuation, none); allow liquidity_sweep/fakeout/engulfing/reversal
  even with RED edge in data collection mode
- Final check: lowered threshold from 15% to 10% for data collection;
  signals with confidence >= 10% and a pattern now generate

This should produce WIN/LOSS signals that feed the statistical engine
and help the system learn which combos actually work." class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e7dfafcffbb0c51ca242ab35aa6dea90fae0d2c2">fix: enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals</a></div></div></td><td><div class="react-directory-commit-age"><relative-time tense="past" datetime="2026-05-23T03:21:30.000Z" title="May 23, 2026, 3:21 AM UTC">May 23, class="react-directory-row-commit-cell"><div><div class="react-directory-commit-message"><a data-pjax="true" title="fix: enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals

Problem: All 60 signals were NO_OPERAR because:
1. Proven Edge Filter blocked everything in strict mode (even unproven combos)
2. OffHours session check killed all signals outside trading hours
3. Edge Profile RED classification blocked non-blocked patterns
4. Confidence threshold too high (15%) for data collection mode

Fixes:
- Proven Edge: strict mode only in production (sampleSize >= 1000);
  data collection allows non-blocked patterns with reduced confidence
- OffHours: in data collection mode, generate signals with -15 confidence penalty
  instead of hard blocking
- Edge Profile RED: only hard-block for confirmed loser patterns (breakout,
  trend_continuation, none); allow liquidity_sweep/fakeout/engulfing/reversal
  even with RED edge in data collection mode
- Final check: lowered threshold from 15% to 10% for data collection;
  signals with confidence >= 10% and a pattern now generate

This should produce WIN/LOSS signals that feed the statistical engine
and help the system learn which combos actually work." class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e7dfafcffbb0c51ca242ab35aa6dea90fae0d2c2">fix: enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals</a></div></div></td><td><div class="react-directory-commit-age"><relative-time tense="past" datetime="2026-05-23T03:21:30.000Z" title="May 23, 2026, 3:21 AM UTC">May 23, data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals

Problem: All 60 signals were NO_OPERAR because:
1. Proven Edge Filter blocked everything in strict mode (even unproven combos)
2. OffHours session check killed all signals outside trading hours
3. Edge Profile RED classification blocked non-blocked patterns
4. Confidence threshold too high (15%) for data collection mode

Fixes:
- Proven Edge: strict mode only in production (sampleSize >= 1000);
  data collection allows non-blocked patterns with reduced confidence
- OffHours: in data collection mode, generate signals with -15 confidence penalty
  instead of hard blocking
- Edge Profile RED: only hard-block for confirmed loser patterns (breakout,
  trend_continuation, none); allow liquidity_sweep/fakeout/engulfing/reversal
  even with RED edge in data collection mode
- Final check: lowered threshold from 15% to 10% for data collection;
  signals with confidence >= 10% and a pattern now generate

This should produce WIN/LOSS signals that feed the statistical engine
and help the system learn which combos actually work." class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e7dfafcffbb0c51ca242ab35aa6dea90fae0d2c2">fix: enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals</a></div></div></td><td><div class="react-directory-commit-age"><relative-time tense="past" datetime="2026-05-23T03:21:30.000Z" title="May 23, 2026, 3:21 AM UTC">May 23, enable data collection mode to generate real WIN/LOSS signals

Problem: All 60 signals were NO_OPERAR because:
1. Proven Edge Filter blocked everything in strict mode (even unproven combos)
2. OffHours session check killed all signals outside trading hours
3. Edge Profile RED classification blocked non-blocked patterns
4. Confidence threshold too high (15%) for data collection mode

Fixes:
- Proven Edge: strict mode only in production (sampleSize >= 1000);
  data collection allows non-blocked patterns with reduced confidence
- OffHours: in data collection mode, generate signals with -15 confidence penalty
  instead of hard blocking
- Edge Profile RED: only hard-block for confirmed loser patterns (breakout,
  trend_continuation, none); allow liquidity_sweep/fakeout/engulfing/reversal
  even with RED edge in data collection mode
- Final check: lowered threshold from 15% to 10% for data collection;
  signals with confidence >= 10% and a pattern now generate

This should produce WIN/LOSS signals that feed the statistical engine
and help the system learn which combos actually work." class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/e7dfafcffbb0c51ca242ab35aa6dea90fae0d2c2">fix: enable data collection mode to generate class="react-directory-row-commit-cell"><div><div class="react-directory-commit-message"><a data-pjax="true" title="fix: switch klines to Binance (reliable), Bybit for extras only — v4 feeder

ROOT CAUSE: Bybit API unreliable from user's network (Colombia).
v3 rate limiter reduced errors 8→3 but didn't eliminate them.

KEY INSIGHT: Phase 3 (market-engine) uses Binance/CoinGecko and
ALWAYS works. Phase 5 (feeder) used Bybit exclusively and always failed.

v4 MARKET DATA FEEDER:
- Binance as PRIMARY for klines/candles (same endpoints as Phase 3)
- Binance 24h ticker for price/volume/spread
- Binance klines for 1h price change
- Bybit ONLY for: funding rate, OI, orderbook (unique data)
- Graceful degradation: if Bybit fails, sentiment still works
- Bybit calls sequential with 1s delays, only if first request works
- Added dataSource tracking (BINANCE/BYBIT/MIXED)
- [FEEDER] v4 summary log for easy debugging" class="Link--secondary" href="/yecos/signalTrade/commit/8dcbc06c031294794900caf0274f04c4dd0ea10b">fix: switch klines to Binance (reliable), Bybit for <p dir="auto"><strong>Motor Cuantitativo Experimental</strong> para registro y verificación de señales de trading.</p>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto">EL DATASET ES EL ACTIVO. No operamos sin edge. NO_OPERAR > operar sin edge.</p>
</blockquote>

<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Market Data Engine</strong> — Datos de mercado (Binance, TwelveData, Finnhub)</li>
<li><strong>Indicators Engine</strong> — RSI, MACD, Bollinger, ATR, EMA, Stochastic, ADX</li>
<li><strong>Pattern Engine</strong> — Breakout, Liquidity Sweep, Engulfing, Fakeout, Reversal</li>
<li><strong>Session Engine</strong> — Asia, London, New York, Overlap</li>
<li><strong>Regime Detection</strong> — TRENDING, RANGING, VOLATILE, LOW_VOL, NEWS, LIQUIDITY_TRAP</li>
<li><strong>Bayesian Stats</strong> — Confidence intervals, adjusted WR, p-values</li>
<li><strong>Expectancy Engine</strong> — EV = (Win% × AvgWin) - (Loss% × AvgLoss)</li>
<li><strong>Quality Filter</strong> — Block low liquidity, high spread, toxic volatility</li>
<li><strong>Feature Engineering</strong> — 20+ features per signal</li>
<li><strong>Auto-Trader</strong> — Data Collection Mode with 24/7 signal generation</li>
</ol>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Opción B: Turso (producción)</strong></p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Instalar Turso CLI</span>
curl -sSfL https://get.tur.so/install.sh <span class="pl-k">|</span> bash
turso auth login

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Crear base de datos</span>
turso db create signaltrader-pro --enable-wal

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Obtener credenciales</span>
turso db show signaltrader-pro --url    <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> → TURSO_DATABASE_URL</span>
turso db tokens create signaltrader-pro  <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> → TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Agregar a .env</span>
<span class="pl-c1">echo</span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>TURSO_DATABASE_URL=libsql://...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-k">>></span> .env
<span class="pl-c1">echo</span> <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN=eyJhbG...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> <span class="pl-k">>></span> .env

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Push schema</span>
npx prisma db push</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# Instalar Turso CLI
curl -sSfL https://get.tur.so/install.sh | bash
turso auth login

# Crear base de datos
turso db create signaltrader-pro --enable-wal

# Obtener credenciales
turso db show signaltrader-pro --url    # → TURSO_DATABASE_URL
turso db tokens create signaltrader-pro  # → TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN

# Agregar a .env
echo "TURSO_DATABASE_URL=libsql://..." >> .env
echo "TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN=eyJhbG..." >> .env

# Push schema
npx prisma db push" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deploy en Vercel</h2><a id="user-content-deploy-en-vercel" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deploy en Vercel" href="#deploy-en-vercel"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Push a GitHub</li>
<li>Conectar repo en <a href="https://vercel.com" rel="nofollow">vercel.com</a></li>
<li>Agregar environment variables:
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>TURSO_DATABASE_URL</code></li>
<li><code>TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN</code></li>
<li><code>DATABASE_URL</code> = <code>file:./db/custom.db</code> (para build)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Deploy automático</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Filosofía</h2><a id="user-content-filosofía" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Filosofía" href="#filosofía"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>DATA FIRST</strong>: El dataset es el activo más valioso. Cada señal guarda 20+ features.</li>
<li><strong>STATS OVER AI</strong>: No usamos LLMs hasta tener 5000+ señales limpias. Prioridad: estadística.</li>
<li><strong>TRANSPARENCIA TOTAL</strong>: Si no hay edge, decimos NO HAY EDGE. Si la muestra es pequeña, lo indicamos.</li>
<li><strong>NO_OPERAR > OPERAR SIN EDGE</strong>: Pensamiento institucional. Proteger el capital.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Roadmap Estadístico</h2><a id="user-content-roadmap-estadístico" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Roadmap Estadístico" href="#roadmap-estadístico"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Registro de señales con verificación automática</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Pattern Engine (6 patrones con lógica matemática)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Session Engine (4 sesiones + overlap)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Regime Detection (6 regímenes de mercado)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Bayesian Stats (CI, p-value, adjusted WR)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Expectancy Engine (EV, risk/reward)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Quality Filter (liquidez, spread, volatilidad)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Completed task" checked=""> Feature Engineering (20+ variables por señal)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> 1000+ señales recolectadas → activar modo estricto</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Feature Importance (qué variables importan más)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Monte Carlo Simulation</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Walk-Forward Testing</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Ensemble Models (solo con dataset suficiente)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" id="" disabled="" class="task-list-item-checkbox" aria-label="Incomplete task"> Reinforcement Learning (solo con 5000+ señales)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Límites del Free Tier</h2><a id="user-content-límites-del-free-tier" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Límites del Free Tier" href="#límites-del-free-tier"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
